description_long: This is a pair of aviator-style glasses featuring large, teardrop-shaped lenses set in a thin, metallic full-rim frame. The lenses are lightly tinted with a cool blue hue, providing both style and sun protection. The frame includes a double bridge design, with a prominent upper bar and a lower bridge that connects the lenses, as well as adjustable nose pads for comfort. The temples are slender and straight, transitioning from metal near the hinges to black plastic or acetate at the ear pieces for added comfort and grip. The overall design is sleek and classic, with no visible embellishments or engravings on the frame or temples. No brand logo or insignia is visible on any part of the glasses.
description: Aviator-style glasses with blue-tinted lenses, thin metallic frame, and black temple tips. Features a double bridge and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, blue-tinted lenses, double bridge, and full-rim metallic frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin metallic frame, black temple tip, and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the back of the blue-tinted lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple, hinge, and the profile of the frame and lenses.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is a classic aviator shape with large, teardrop lenses and a thin, full-rim structure. It features a double bridge, with a prominent upper bar and a lower bridge, and straight, slender temples that curve slightly at the ends.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses have a uniform, cool blue tint that is semi-transparent, allowing some visibility through the lenses. There is no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a double bridge design, consisting of a straight upper bar and a lower curved bridge, with adjustable nose pads attached for comfort.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin and straight, transitioning from metallic near the hinges to black plastic or acetate at the ear tips. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or embellishments.
